rulings.Case Title: UMPQUA BANK VS. XELAN PROP 1, LLC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Answer And Request For Entry Of Default Against Xelan Prop 1, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF UMPQUA BANK Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Answer And Request For Entry Of Default Against Xelan Prop 1, LLC continued to August 16, 2019 for Xelan Prop 1, LLC to obtain counsel. Substitution of attorney to be filed no later than August 15, 2019 by noon. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Ccp 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF DAN MULREADY MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Ccp 664.6 GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to prepare order and judgment. = (501/CFH)
